canon.validation: Public extraction matched source canon counts at build time.

gojomons.name: Abyssal Angler
gojomons.description: A deep-water ghost-fish that lures prey with a false light. Wears foes down with status and special pressure rather than brute force.

gojomons.name: Aethernox
gojomons.description: A many-winged dragon of reincarnation; each scale holds a lifetime. A run-defining legend that bends growth and fate alike.

gojomons.name: Anvilion
gojomons.description: A one-eyed sentinel golem guarding a gate to nowhere. Heavier and harder, it turns the battlefield into a siege.

gojomons.name: Belldel
gojomons.description: A bell-shaped storm construct that hums with stored charge. Balanced bulk and special output make it the team's battery and backbone.

gojomons.name: Catra
gojomons.description: A lithe mystic feline that strikes from blind angles. High special power and speed but little to spare on defense - it ends fights before they start.

gojomons.name: Chimmy
gojomons.description: A twitchy alien beast moving faster than instinct should allow. Blistering speed and physical bite, paper-thin everywhere else.

gojomons.name: Chupaflux
gojomons.description: An unstable alien-machine that drains and glitches what it touches. Fast and special-leaning but fragile - a hit-and-run saboteur.

gojomons.name: Cindara
gojomons.description: Cinder Hare's grown form - a lantern-striped cat wreathed in calligraphic flame. Faster and fiercer, it presses advantages its smaller self never could.

gojomons.name: Cinder Hare
gojomons.description: A spark-fueled hare that ignites with every leap. Trades bulk for blazing speed - strikes first, burns fast, and rarely sticks around to take a hit.

gojomons.name: Cogspar
gojomons.description: A small miner-automaton endlessly digging for a core it never finds. Sturdy, patient, and built to take hits.

gojomons.name: Cradroot
gojomons.description: A mangrove-mother whose roots cradle the fallen and plant them anew. Slow and immovable, it turns a grove into a fortress and decay into fresh growth.

gojomons.name: Cranedel
gojomons.description: A radiant fire-crane that strikes with talon and flare alike. Strong mixed offense and decent speed make it a flexible attacker.

gojomons.name: Cranelum
gojomons.description: A paper-crane spirit that unfolds into searing light. Fragile origami hiding a piercing radiance.

gojomons.name: Cyclowl
gojomons.description: An owl whose wings carve spiraling storm-tunnels. It scatters foes and rides the chaos it makes.

gojomons.name: Dragonel
gojomons.description: A slow, scaled life-reptile that simply refuses to fall. Big HP and defense let it outlast aggressors and grind value over time.

gojomons.name: Dreamoon
gojomons.description: A sleep-spirit whose dreams gently reshape reality. Soft-spoken control that bends a fight before it begins.

gojomons.name: Ferronova
gojomons.description: A clockwork sun that resets time whenever it fails to rise. Radiant machinery that buoys the team turn after turn.

gojomons.name: Fishdel
gojomons.description: A murky water-shade that fights smart, not flashy. Even stats with a touch of bite let it flex between pressure and brawling.

gojomons.name: Florisha
gojomons.description: A lotus-deer that blossoms once for each life it has lived. Radiant sustain that turns healing into a slow, blooming offense.

gojomons.name: Florune
gojomons.description: A cycle-flower that sheds petals to mend its allies. A humble healer that thrives by giving itself away.

gojomons.name: Forgeel
gojomons.description: A molten anvil-tortoise whose shell glows white-hot when it braces. Endures punishment and forges it into pressure.

gojomons.name: Gearghoul
gojomons.description: A haunted automaton animated by trapped spirits. Glitching and vengeful, it corrodes foes from the inside.

gojomons.name: Gemerelda
gojomons.description: A faceted light-gem that turns harm back on attackers. Even bulk and strong special defense make it a patient, protective anchor.

gojomons.name: Glaymoth
gojomons.description: A data-moth that disintegrates the instant it touches the light it craves. Beautiful, doomed, and disruptive.

gojomons.name: Glimmy
gojomons.description: A gentle life-spirit that mends as it lingers. Strong special bulk and modest power - it wins by keeping the team alive, not by hitting hard.

gojomons.name: GreenCatra
gojomons.description: A mutant Catra strain wired for mischief. Extreme speed and special power with brittle bulk - it disrupts and outpaces before retaliation lands.

gojomons.name: Infinarch
gojomons.description: A colossus of stormlight and machinery ascending an endless staircase. An unstoppable legend that only grows heavier with the climb.

gojomons.name: Kappalette
gojomons.description: A lotus-frog spirit that heals allies when submerged. Gentle, balanced, and quietly indispensable.

gojomons.name: Kappantra
gojomons.description: A lotus-dancer kappa spinning a bowl that reflects souls. Its grown poise turns sustain into a war of attrition.

gojomons.name: Kindrel
gojomons.description: A lantern-spirit whose flame both leads and deceives. A modest guide that grows into a beacon.

gojomons.name: Koko
gojomons.description: A vengeful dark spirit that hits like a landslide. Towering attack and speed, almost no defense - a true glass cannon that lives or dies on its first move.

gojomons.name: Lotunari
gojomons.description: A dream-elephant carrying miniature stars in its trunk. Its presence steadies and uplifts the whole team.

gojomons.name: Maelura
gojomons.description: A leviathan of the deep tides whose presence calms or drowns. The Water realm's apex - an ocean that simply outlasts everything.

gojomons.name: Makrill
gojomons.description: A makara of crocodile and carp plating, guardian of temple gates. A slow, armored wall that simply does not yield.

gojomons.name: Mindveil
gojomons.description: A hooded psychic cat that reads thought with eyes closed. It unravels foes before they commit to a move.

gojomons.name: Neuroseed
gojomons.description: A floating jelly-core decoding 'life' through mimicry. Strange and soft, it learns the fight as it goes.

gojomons.name: Noko
gojomons.description: A steady dark spirit with no glaring weakness. Even stats make it a dependable all-rounder that adapts to whatever the fight needs.

gojomons.name: Nulling
gojomons.description: A shadow of logic that drains meaning from its surroundings. Quietly erodes a fight until nothing is left.

gojomons.name: Nyxcrow
gojomons.description: A trickster raven that shapeshifts mid-attack. Reads the player between cycles and never plays it straight.

gojomons.name: Obelune
gojomons.description: A floating rune-stone head that speaks only in glyphs. An ancient monolith that endures and answers slowly.

gojomons.name: Omnindra
gojomons.description: A three-faced deity of serenity, doubt, and clarity whose faces never align. A legend embodying the Wanderer realm - light, dark, and mind in one.

gojomons.name: Pyrethon
gojomons.description: A sky-scorching wyrm wreathed in perpetual flame. The Fire realm's apex - relentless, blinding offense few can outlast.

gojomons.name: Pyrridra
gojomons.description: An ash-phoenix serpent born from volcanic glass; smaller forms hatch from its own heartstone. It burns brightest when cornered.

gojomons.name: Qilin-9
gojomons.description: A cyber-qilin forged to restore balance, if it can relearn compassion. An even, dependable bridge between gear and growth - quicker on its feet than it looks.

gojomons.name: Quetzabranch
gojomons.description: A feathered-serpent vine that pollinates as it strikes from the sky. Fast, green lightning with a wide reach.

gojomons.name: Rainspire
gojomons.description: A living antenna eroded by the tempests it draws. It conducts chaos through anything nearby.

gojomons.name: Rendclaw
gojomons.description: A clawed xeno-predator that phases between strikes. All instinct and edge, it commits fully or not at all.

gojomons.name: Samsiron
gojomons.description: A self-repairing war-golem that devours the unworthy. A late, fortress-like final form built to outlast and overrun.

gojomons.name: Saprim
gojomons.description: A fungal beast that sprouts mossy clones and seeds rot. It wins the long game by poisoning the present.

gojomons.name: Scarmonk
gojomons.description: A charred monk spirit that reforms its cracked body mid-battle. Discipline through combustion - steady, hard to put down.

gojomons.name: Seraphawn
gojomons.description: A many-eyed lion seraph that judges by watching. Serene, unmovable, and quietly overwhelming.

gojomons.name: Shroomnix
gojomons.description: A spore-laden fungus that smothers foes slowly. Enormous special defense and HP - it stalls, seeds status, and waits out the clock.

gojomons.name: Slugel
gojomons.description: A briny aquatic wall that oozes forward and absorbs everything. Huge HP and defense, glacial speed - it wins routes by simply not dying.

gojomons.name: Solmere
gojomons.description: A glass-winged manta that guides lost travelers across the desert sun. A serene, radiant final form of light and tide.

gojomons.name: Tempestris
gojomons.description: A cloud-ape that wields lightning as a staff and dances with storms. Free, fast, and unpredictable.

gojomons.name: Thundraco
gojomons.description: A thunderbird-dragon hybrid of sky and storm. Verdant lightning that strikes from cloud to canopy.

gojomons.name: Tidemourn
gojomons.description: A weeping shrine-fish whose tears crystallize into memory pearls. Bulky and psychic; it remembers every wound.

gojomons.name: Umbrieve
gojomons.description: An eclipse-wolf that splits into twin shadows mid-pounce. Hits hard and fast from places it shouldn't be.

gojomons.name: Veeprion
gojomons.description: A holographic serpent of knowledge that consumes its own code. It assimilates and unwrites whatever it studies.

gojomons.name: Volcarion
gojomons.description: A volcanic lion whose roar forges updrafts into storms. A late, hard-won final form - overwhelming offense that demands real investment to reach.

gojomons.name: Volkarta
gojomons.description: A living-mountain volcano tortoise that erupts only when provoked. Immovable until the pressure finally blows.

gojomons.name: Voltrem
gojomons.description: A lightning hound forever chasing the echo of its own thunder. All reckless power and speed, with almost nothing left over for defense.

gojomons.name: Xenarch
gojomons.description: An extradimensional sovereign that warps space around its strikes. The Alien realm's apex - it rewrites the battle's rules as it fights.

gojomons.name: Zephyreel
gojomons.description: A fallen angel of turbine wings flying forever upward. Brilliant, relentless aerial pressure.

items.name: Alien Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Alien type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Alien Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Alien and cloaks it in a warped aura.

items.name: Aqua Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Water moves by 30%.

items.name: Arc Coil
items.description: Verb gear (Storm / Chain). Every 5th hit cleaves another enemy for 30% damage.

items.name: Arcane Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Mystic moves by 30%.

items.name: Attack Amp
items.description: Temporarily boosts the holder's Attack by 50% for 3 turns.

items.name: Bulwark Shard
items.description: Permanently raises one mon's Defense (~+10%). Use on a chosen party member.

items.name: Choice Relay
items.description: Locks the holder into one move, but boosts its damage by 20%.

items.name: Cinder Fang
items.description: Verb gear (Fire / Burn). The holder's hits have a 22% chance to BURN the target (stacks, cap 3).

items.name: Commander's Crest
items.description: Equipped to your Master: your whole party's attacks deal +15% damage.

items.name: Dark Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Dark type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Dark Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Dark and cloaks it in a shadow aura.

items.name: Defense Amp
items.description: Temporarily boosts the holder's Defense by 50% for 3 turns.

items.name: Demon Sword
items.description: While the holder is below 30% HP, its attacks deal +30% damage.

items.name: Echo Prism
items.description: Verb gear (Mystic / Echo). Any hit has a 15% chance to ECHO for half damage.

items.name: Ember Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Ember move by 30%.

items.name: Field Kit
items.description: Use on an ally to heal 20% of its max HP.

items.name: Fire Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Fire type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Fire Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Fire and cloaks it in a fiery aura.

items.name: Flame Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Fire moves by 30%.

items.name: Fleet Shard
items.description: Permanently raises one mon's Speed (~+10%). Use on a chosen party member.

items.name: Focus Shard
items.description: Permanently raises one mon's Sp. Attack (~+10%). Use on a chosen party member.

items.name: Gear Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Machine moves by 30%.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Auto-heals the holder for 30% max HP when it drops below 30%. One charge.

items.name: Hex Brand Charm
items.description: Verb gear (Dark / Corrupt). The holder's hits have a 30% chance to BRAND the target (+6% damage taken per brand, up to 5).

items.name: Last Stand Band
items.description: 25% chance to survive a KO hit with 1 HP.

items.name: Life Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Life type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Life Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Life and cloaks it in a verdant aura.

items.name: Light Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Light moves by 30%.

items.name: Light Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Light type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Light Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Light and cloaks it in a radiant aura.

items.name: Machine Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Machine type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Machine Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Machine and cloaks it in a steel aura.

items.name: Mirror Ward Plate
items.description: Verb gear (Light / Reflect). 15% of the damage the holder takes is reflected at the attacker.

items.name: Mystic Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Mystic.

items.name: Mystic Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Mystic type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Mystic Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Mystic and cloaks it in an arcane aura.

items.name: Perfect Capture Orb
items.description: Never fails. The one you save for something worth keeping.

items.name: Phoenix Ember
items.description: Once per battle, the holder survives a KO hit with 1 HP.

items.name: Power Shard
items.description: Permanently raises one mon's Attack (~+10%). Use on a chosen party member.

items.name: Prime Capture Orb
items.description: A premium capture orb. ~97% catch chance on a defeated wild.

items.name: Rare Candy
items.description: Instantly raises a chosen mon's level by 1.

items.name: Reliable Capture Orb
items.description: A sturdy capture orb. ~85% catch chance on a defeated wild.

items.name: Rescue Potion
items.description: Use on a fainted or weak ally to revive and heal 35% of its max HP.

items.name: Spore Barb
items.description: Verb gear (Alien / Infect). The holder's hits have a 20% chance to poison the target.

items.name: Standard Capture Orb
items.description: A basic capture orb. ~60% catch chance on a defeated wild.

items.name: Steel Coat
items.description: Passively boosts the holder's Defense by 20%.

items.name: Storm Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Storm moves by 30%.

items.name: Storm Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Storm type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Storm Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Storm and cloaks it in a charged aura.

items.name: Storm Shield
items.description: Makes the holder immune to Storm-type damage.

items.name: Swift Lens
items.description: Passively improves accuracy by 10%.

items.name: Tideguard Pearl
items.description: Verb gear (Water / Flow). The holder takes ~13% less special damage.

items.name: Training Manual: Ember
items.description: Teaches a Gojomon the move Ember (Fire).

items.name: Training Manual: Shadow Jab
items.description: Teaches a Gojomon the move Shadow Jab (Dark).

items.name: Umbral Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Dark moves by 30%.

items.name: Verdant Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Life moves by 30%.

items.name: Verdant Seed
items.description: Verb gear (Life / Sustain). While below 50% HP, the holder heals 8% max HP at turn start.

items.name: Vital Root
items.description: Permanently raises one mon's max HP (~+10%). Use on a chosen party member.

items.name: Vitality Core
items.description: Boosts all damage by 30% but the holder loses 10% HP each attack.

items.name: Void Charm
items.description: Boosts the holder's Alien moves by 30%.

items.name: Water Graft
items.description: Grafts an honorary Water type onto a single-type holder (no effect on dual-types).

items.name: Water Prism Core
items.description: Rewrites the holder's type to Water and cloaks it in a tidal aura.

items.name: Wear Plating
items.description: Verb gear (Machine / Construct). When the holder is struck, the attacker takes chip damage (5% of its own max HP).

relics.name: Aegis
relics.description: Your party takes ~17% less damage.

relics.name: Ashfall Crown
relics.description: Your CRITS set the target burning (intensifying existing burns).

relics.name: Berserker Aura
relics.description: While below 60% HP, your attacks deal +20% damage.

relics.name: Bloodthirst
relics.description: Critical hit rate increased by 12%.

relics.name: Blueprint Core
relics.description: Machine / Construct. Party takes ~17% less physical damage. (True item-synergy version is future work.)

relics.name: Burning Blood
relics.description: Your attacks deal +30% damage, but you take 10% recoil. (The costlier sibling of Glass Cannon.)

relics.name: Carrion Feast
relics.description: Your attacks deal +18% damage to AFFLICTED targets (cursed, blinded, or burning).

relics.name: Champion's Will
relics.description: Fire / Will. KO an enemy: gain +1 Attack stage. Fire moves deal +25% damage.

relics.name: Cinder Focus
relics.description: Your crit chance rises against BURNING targets (+12% per burn stack).

relics.name: Collector's Eye
relics.description: You catch the unfamiliar with ease: 1.35 capture chance vs a wild whose types you don't own yet (no bonus if you already own any of its types).

relics.name: Conductor Coil
relics.description: Storm / Chain. Every 5th hit cleaves another enemy for 30% damage.

relics.name: Crit Loom
relics.description: After landing 5 critical hits, your hits deal +40% bonus damage - a payoff for crit-heavy builds.

relics.name: Dream Catalyst
relics.description: Mystic / Echo. Mystic moves deal +15% damage, and any hit has a 25% chance to ECHO for half damage.

relics.name: Echo Bell
relics.description: Any hit has a 15% chance to ECHO, striking again for half damage.

relics.name: Ember Brand
relics.description: Your attacks have a 25% chance to BURN the target - burns STACK (up to 3), intensifying the damage each turn.

relics.name: Ember Charm
relics.description: Fire / commit. Your Fire moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Far Sight
relics.description: Party moves gain +20% accuracy.

relics.name: Gear Charm
relics.description: Machine / commit. Your Machine moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Glass Cannon
relics.description: Your attacks deal +25% damage, but you take 8% recoil.

relics.name: Glass Reactor
relics.description: Your attacks deal +45% damage, but you take 16% recoil - a high-roll for a team that can out-sustain the cost.

relics.name: Hex Brand
relics.description: Your hits have a 30% chance to BRAND the target (it takes +6% damage per brand, up to 5).

relics.name: Keen Eye
relics.description: Party moves gain +15% accuracy.

relics.name: Larval Pod
relics.description: Alien / Assimilate. Every 5th hit is a critical hit.

relics.name: Lumen Charm
relics.description: Light / commit. Your Light moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Lure Totem
relics.description: Wild Gojomon come quietly: +12% to all capture chance.

relics.name: Mirror Ward
relics.description: When an ally is struck, 15% of the damage is reflected back at the attacker.

relics.name: Momentum
relics.description: Every 6th hit cleaves another enemy for 30% damage.

relics.name: Oasis Charm
relics.description: After every 3 critical hits, heal 12% max HP.

relics.name: Obsidian Veil
relics.description: Dark / Corrupt. After every 5 crits, deal +40% bonus damage.

relics.name: Prism Seal
relics.description: Light / Protect. Light types are immune to Dark damage.

relics.name: Purification Crystal
relics.description: Your active mons are cured of status conditions at the start of each turn.

relics.name: Reckless Idol
relics.description: While below 55% HP your attacks deal +35% damage - but your party takes ~18% more physical damage.

relics.name: Root Heart
relics.description: Life / Regrow. After every 4 crits, heal 18% max HP.

relics.name: Rune Charm
relics.description: Mystic / commit. Your Mystic moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Second Wind
relics.description: After every 4 critical hits, heal 15% max HP.

relics.name: Soot Veil
relics.description: Your hits have a 25% chance to BLIND the target for 2 turns (its attacks lose 25% accuracy).

relics.name: Spark Charm
relics.description: Storm / commit. Your Storm moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Spore Charm
relics.description: Alien / commit. Your Alien moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Stoneward
relics.description: Your party takes ~15% less physical damage.

relics.name: Storm Cycle
relics.description: Every 5th hit lands a guaranteed critical hit - a crit ENABLER for steady multi-hit builds.

relics.name: Sun Pyre
relics.description: Fire's signature relic - your Fire moves deal +30% damage.

relics.name: Tide Charm
relics.description: Water / commit. Your Water moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Tide Sigil
relics.description: Water / Flow. Party takes ~17% less special damage.

relics.name: Umbra Charm
relics.description: Dark / commit. Your Dark moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Venom Needle
relics.description: Your attacks have a 20% chance to poison the target.

relics.name: Verdant Charm
relics.description: Life / commit. Your Life moves deal +10% damage.

relics.name: Void Cleave
relics.description: Every 5th hit cleaves a second enemy for 35% damage - light AoE pressure.

relics.name: Wear Coil
relics.description: When an ally is struck, the attacker takes chip damage (5% of its OWN max HP) - attacking your wall wears it down.
